prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: COLLAPSIBLE-WATER-CARRIER-5-GALLON Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Carrier with Handle 5 Gallon Description: Stay hydrated on the go with the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Carrier.

This will hold up to 5 gallons of water, yet collapses to be small and compact. Comes with strong handle that folds flat for ease of transportation and on/off spigot to avoid spills. When collapsed this can easily fit into backpacks or fanny packs. Made with food-grade PVC material.

Water Carrier provides an easy way to transport water on-the-go, no matter where you are. This is ideal for hiking, camping, backpacking, boating, or biking. Make sure to grab one of these before your next adventure. Search Terms: water carrier hiking camping container asr outdoor Features: - 5 gallon capacity - Comes with handle and on/off spigot - Easily store in backpack, folds up nicely - Extends and Collapses with Ease - Great for hiking and camping as well as disaster relief use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 Gallon Collapsible Water Carrier

anthropic.title_differentiation: Folds Compact, On-Off Spigot, Food-Grade PVC, Handle Included, Hiking And Camping Ready

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Gallon Capacity, Foldable For Backpack Storage, Handle, On And Off Spigot, Food-Grade PVC, Hiking Camping
